# Freelancer Platform - Product Requirements Document (PRD) + Technical Requirements (TRD)
**Version:** 1.0 | **Date:** 25 Mar 2026 | **Generated by NivixPe Team**

## 1. Project Overview
**Vision:** A scalable, global freelance marketplace with trust, transparency, and real-time collaboration.

**Target Users:**
- **Freelancers** (service providers)
- **Clients** (employers)
- **Platform Admins**

**Core Value Proposition:**
Secure payments, verified profiles, milestone-based delivery, dispute resolution.

## 2. User Roles & Permissions

| Role       | Capabilities |
|------------|--------------|
| **Freelancer** | Create profile, Browse & bid on projects, Submit deliverables, Withdraw earnings, Leave reviews |
| **Client**     | Post projects, Review bids, Award contracts, Release milestone payments, Raise disputes |
| **Admin**      | Verify users, Manage disputes, Handle refunds, Platform analytics, Feature flags |

## 3. Core Feature Modules

### 3.1 Authentication & Profiles
- Email / Google / GitHub OAuth2 login
- KYC-lite: Govt ID upload + face match
- Skill tags, portfolio uploads, certifications
- Freelancer rating score (weighted average)
- Profile completeness score + nudges

### 3.2 Project & Contest Management
- Project types: **Fixed Price**, **Hourly**, **Contest**
- Visibility: Public / Invite-Only / Private
- Client posts: title, description, skills, budget range, deadline
- Milestone creation (phased delivery)
- Auto-categorization via NLP (optional AI)

### 3.3 Bidding System
- Freelancers submit: price, delivery time, proposal text
- Bid analytics: avg bid, total bids, skill match %
- Client can shortlist, message, or award
- Bid credits system (freemium model)

### 3.4 Payments & Escrow
- Escrow wallet per project (funds locked on award)
- Milestone release on client approval
- Payout methods: Bank, UPI, Payoneer, Crypto (optional)
- Platform fee: configurable % (deducted on release)
- Refund flow with dispute gate

### 3.5 Messaging & Collaboration
- Real-time project chat (WebSocket / Socket.IO)
- File attachments (≤ 50MB)
- Video call link sharing (Jitsi/Zoom)
- Notifications: in-app, email, push (PWA)

### 3.6 Reviews & Reputation
- Mutual reviews (client + freelancer)
- Star rating (1–5) + written feedback
- Admin moderation
- Badge system: Top Rated, Rising Talent, Verified

### 3.7 Dispute Resolution
- Dispute filing with evidence
- Admin mediation panel
- Escrow hold during dispute
- Partial release / full refund outcomes

### 3.8 Admin Dashboard
- User management (verify/ban/warn)
- Revenue analytics (GMV, take rate, churn)
- Project/bid activity heatmaps
- Dispute queue
- Feature flag toggles

## 4. Technical Requirements (TRD)

### 4.1 System Architecture
**Microservices** with **API Gateway** pattern.

| Layer              | Technology                          | Notes |
|--------------------|-------------------------------------|-------|
| Frontend Web       | Next.js 14 (App Router) + TS        | Tailwind + shadcn/ui |
| Mobile App         | React Native (Expo) + TS            | Shared logic |
| API Gateway        | Kong / AWS API Gateway              | Rate limiting, auth |
| Auth Service       | Node.js + Passport.js + JWT         | OAuth2 |
| Project Service    | NestJS                              | CRUD, bidding |
| Payment Service    | Node.js + Razorpay/Stripe           | Escrow, webhooks |
| Chat Service       | Node.js + Socket.IO                 | Real-time |
| Notification Svc   | Node.js + FCM + SendGrid            | Push/email |
| Search             | Elasticsearch                       | Full-text |
| DB                 | PostgreSQL 15 + Prisma              | Primary |
| Cache              | Redis 7                             | Sessions, rate limits |
| File Storage       | AWS S3 / Cloudflare R2              | Uploads |
| Queue              | Kafka / BullMQ                      | Async jobs |
| CI/CD & Deploy     | GitHub Actions + Docker + K8s       | AWS/GCP |

### 4.2 Core Database Entities (PostgreSQL)

### 4.4 Non-Functional Requirements
- API p95 < 200ms
- LCP < 2.5s
- 10,000+ concurrent users at launch
- 99.9% uptime
- Full OWASP + GDPR compliance
- PCI-compliant (no raw card data)

- Security 20%
- Scalability Design 15%
- Documentation 10%
- Testing >70% coverage 5%

**Note:** No mocks, no hardcoded values, everything via `.env`.
